description_long: This frying pan features a deep, round basin with a dark, almost black surface accented by a striking red, crackled pattern reminiscent of molten lava or volcanic rock. The pan's body appears robust and heavy, likely made from cast iron or a similar dense metal, giving it a solid and durable feel. A single, straight handle extends from one side, also dark in color, with a visible hole at the end for hanging. The rim of the pan is thick and straight, without any flaring or pouring spouts, contributing to its sturdy appearance. On the side of the pan, there is a bold, stylized red marking or logo, adding a unique visual element. The bottom surface of the pan is not fully visible, but the crackled pattern seems to continue, suggesting a textured or decorative finish.
description: A heavy, dark frying pan with a red crackled pattern, straight handle with a hanging hole, and a bold red marking on the side. The design is robust and visually striking, with a thick rim and textured surface.
description_view_0: The pan is seen from a side angle, highlighting the red crackled pattern, the bold red marking on the side, and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: A top-down view shows the circular opening of the pan, the thick rim, and the handle with a visible hanging hole, while the interior crackled pattern is subtly visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the depth of the pan and the continuation of the crackled pattern, with the handle extending to the left and no visible markings on this side.
description_view_3: The pan is viewed from the opposite side, showing the handle end-on and the red marking partially visible on the rim, with the crackled pattern wrapping around the body.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of the same material as the pan, with a flat profile and a hanging hole at the end; no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Thick, straight rim with no flaring or pouring spouts; the edge appears robust and slightly rounded for durability.
attribute_brand_logo: A bold, stylized red marking or logo is present on the side of the pan near the rim.
attribute_bottom_pattern: The bottom surface features a continuation of the red crackled pattern, suggesting a textured or decorative finish.
